findings.invariants: zero violations across all four scenarios — replay, accounting, and graph well-formedness held under a weak model

bug_fixed_successor_nesting.evidence: S1: nesting depth 5 in 12 cycles; runs/criticism: depth 7, 52/70 problems multi-nested, max description 1972 chars — pack size compounds per refutation generation
bug_fixed_successor_nesting.fix: rules/spawn.py successor block now carries the ROOT description (text after the last 'Original problem:' marker); regression test test_successor_descriptions_do_not_nest

calibration_school_convergence_dead.evidence: S3 measured inter_school_min_dist=0.861 (mean pairwise 0.79) vs RESEED_DIST_MIN=0.15 — 5x below the HashingEmbedder's operating range; the flag and the reseed ladder rung cannot fire with default components
calibration_school_convergence_dead.recommendation: threshold should be relative to the embedder's observed scale (e.g. a fraction of mean_pairwise_dist) — a knob-semantics decision, reported not changed

observations.S1: xs.2 produced NO schema failures as conjecturer over 12 cycles (json_mode is enough) — garbage-generation pressure needs an even weaker path or higher temperature
observations.S2: xs judge seat split the ensemble only once in 10 cycles — xs agrees with pro more than its benchmarks suggest
observations.S3: ladder interventions still zero live: stagnation requires contraction AND zero churn, but the critic keeps churn nonzero
